global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple gradient background with various game icons and text elements promoting a game.
global.main_message: Unlock rare gear with no ads in the first week.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient fills the entire background, creating a vibrant and engaging atmosphere.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: A small, circular game icon with a simple design, positioned at the top left of the ad.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: Another small, circular game icon with a distinct design, located next to the first icon at the top.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: A small, circular game icon with a unique design, centered in the middle section of the ad.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: Another small, circular game icon with a different design, positioned next to the previous icon in the center.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: A small, circular game icon with a simple design, located at the top right of the ad.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: Text that reads 'UGC' in bold, large font, prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Unlock gear text
elements.description: Text that states 'Unlock rare gear' in a clear, readable font, centered in the lower section of the ad.

elements.label: No ads text
elements.description: Text that reads 'No ads in first week' in a smaller font, positioned below the unlock gear text.

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A rectangular button with rounded corners that reads 'Get offer' in bold text, located at the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Unknown element

elements.description: The bold text 'VoxelRealm' is prominently displayed at the top of the ad, capturing attention.
